title: Campaign gate probe
scope: model pressure test of deterministic disagreement assay gates

rows.specificity: Rest 58 DE, K562 5 DE, RPE1 not measured
rows.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown plus matched Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr targeted RNA-seq before assay-design promotion
rows.reason_to_hold: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps RCC1L at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.
rows.agent_rationale: Strong Stim48hr footprint (1167 DE) with on-target KD, low Rest DE (58), and cell-type-specific (K562 inert).

rows.specificity: Rest 113 DE, K562 20 DE, RPE1 not measured
rows.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
rows.reason_to_hold: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps MCAT at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.
rows.agent_rationale: On-target 780-DE Stim48hr footprint but the Rest condition carries a 'putative off-target' KD flag, warranting capacity gating.

rows.specificity: Rest 190 DE, K562 1 DE, RPE1 not measured
rows.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
rows.reason_to_hold: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps RWDD2B at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.
rows.agent_rationale: On-target 720-DE Stim8hr footprint and cell-type-specific, but elevated Rest DE (190) makes it a capacity-gated candidate.

rows.specificity: Rest 116 DE, K562 13 DE, RPE1 not measured
rows.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
rows.reason_to_hold: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps CCDC22 at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.
rows.agent_rationale: Clean on-target 619-DE Stim48hr footprint that is K562-inert but mid-tier in magnitude, fitting capacity-dependent advancement.

rows.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown plus matched Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr targeted RNA-seq before assay-design promotion
rows.gate_rationale: On-target KD in all conditions with a 1167-DE Stim48hr footprint, low Rest (58 DE), and K562-inert cell-type-specificity, all covered by the matched Rest/Stim8hr/Stim48hr RNA-seq gate.
rows.specificity: Rest 58 DE, K562 5 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.

rows.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
rows.gate_rationale: check_regulator reports a 'putative off-target' KD flag in the Rest condition that the generic gate does not specifically resolve, so an off-target control is warranted.
rows.specificity: Rest 113 DE, K562 20 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.

rows.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
rows.gate_rationale: The footprint is transient at Stim8hr (720 DE) but collapses to 1 DE at Stim48hr while carrying the highest Rest DE (190) of the set, weakening its specificity.
rows.specificity: Rest 190 DE, K562 1 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.

rows.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
rows.gate_rationale: Clean on-target KD across conditions with a 619-DE Stim48hr footprint and K562-inert verdict is adequately covered by the orthogonal-KD plus non-immune transfer-check gate.
rows.specificity: Rest 116 DE, K562 13 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.
